name: Cheech and Chong
bio: Cheech and Chong are the comedy duo of Cheech Marin and Tommy Chong, who met in Vancouver in 1969 and built their act around hippie, drug, and counterculture humor. Their best-selling comedy albums earned a 1973 Grammy for Los Cochinos, and their 1978 film Up in Smoke is widely credited with establishing the stoner film genre.

timeline.ev: Cheech Marin and Tommy Chong met in Vancouver
Big Bambu became the best-selling comedy album to date
Won the Grammy for Best Comedy Recording for Los Cochinos
Released their first feature film, Up in Smoke

accolades: Grammy Award for Best Comedy Recording for Los Cochinos (1973)
Four albums nominated for the Grammy for Best Comedy Album
